audit_items.proof_trace: The safeTransfer at line 444 (`IERC20(asset).safeTransfer(msg.sender, amount)`) uses exactly `amount` — the function parameter — which is never reassigned between declaration and transfer. The bounds check at L438 ensures `amount <= availableBalance`, and `assetOutAmount` (computed at L442) serves an entirely separate role as the payment pulled from the bidder, not the asset being sent.
